text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Fan Fest has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf takes to the specially erected
stage to lead the opening ceremony.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
As I announced several days ago on TV, I have
christened this event the academy's first Mega
Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
At the time, I explained that this represented its
increased scale and participation...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But, to tell the truth, there is one more "mega"
aspect to this Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Namely, the scale of our gratitude for our fans.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We would not be able to chase our dreams if you
did not come to watch us race.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We all strive to honor your support with our best
performances, but this alone cannot repay our
debt.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So, on behalf of all the Umamusume of Tracen
Academy, allow me to express my gratitude to
each and every one of you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's opening address is a little
formal, but her commanding demeanor has the
fans listening raptly... to a point.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well then, allow me to bring this address to a
close with a spot of comedy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Like a gutter on a stormy day, I am a "grate full."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Murmur... murmur...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What is she doing?! There weren't any puns in the
script!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Damn it! She's gone rogue!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other student council members tense up. And
the audience's reaction is...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: H-hey... Th-that was pretty funny... I think?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I didn't really get it... but anything Symboli Rudolf
says sounds cool to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The audience erupts with applause. But as for
Symboli Rudolf herself...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That didn't land quite how I'd hoped. This calls
for some refinement...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...She seems to be regretting her decision.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Huh? That was a joke? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Wait, a grate full... Grate full... Grateful! I get it!
It's a joke!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
You know, I keep wondering... Do you think the
President secretly likes comedy?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking the same thing! Only, she's so
serious, I figured there was no way...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume C
text_block_list.text:
Wait, you two as well?! Then, there's no doubt
about it...

text_block_list.name: Trio
text_block_list.text: The President's a pun-lover!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: The Emperor cracking jokes?! I love it!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Gahahaha! Go Symboli Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They're all laughing! I knew my secret weapon
wouldn't fail me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf's joke sets the crowd on fire! Even
if it's not quite in the way she intended.
